name: The Long March | Loji.AI | Zheng-Chan
description:
Meet our most beloved chinese AI... Loji!
(erm she is actually called ''The Long March'' 🤓)
Glory to Loji! Eternally may live our Supreme (vtuber) Leader, Zheng-Chan!


This image in the description is from this post and this is the user.
The Loji that im basing this bot on originates from a Hearts of Iron IV mod called 'The Fire Rises'.
Which in turn, based THEIR Loji from 'The Long March' AI from a now abandoned Hearts of Iron IV mod called 'Eternal Golden Dawn'.
TFR moment lol
As for the image in the bots profile picture, I took it from this twitter post made by the developers of the mod.
creator: Baron_von_Altgrave
